'''dhayoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coaddition|coaddition]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-y-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coaddition|coaddition]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhayoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæyeyeth|dhæyeyeth]] || [[word:dhæyeyej|dhæyeyej]] || [[word:dhæyeyesh|dhæyeyesh]] || [[word:dhæyeye|dhæyeye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhayoyoyoth|dhayoyoyoth]] || [[word:dhayoyoyoj|dhayoyoyoj]] || [[word:dhayoyoyosh|dhayoyoyosh]] || [[word:dhayoyoyo|dhayoyoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhayoyoth|dhayoyoth]] || [[word:dhayoyoj|dhayoyoj]] || [[word:dhayoyosh|dhayoyosh]] || [[word:dhayoyo|dhayoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhayofyoth|dhayofyoth]] || [[word:dhayofyoj|dhayofyoj]] || [[word:dhayofyosh|dhayofyosh]] || [[word:dhayofyof|dhayofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhayoyotho|dhayoyotho]] || [[word:dhayoyojo|dhayoyojo]] || [[word:dhayoyosho|dhayoyosho]] || [[word:dhayoyoko|dhayoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhayoyoth|dhayoyoth]] || [[word:dhayoyoj|dhayoyoj]] || [[word:dhayoyosh|dhayoyosh]] || [[word:dhayoyo|dhayoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhayoyothol|dhayoyothol]] || [[word:dhayoyojol|dhayoyojol]] || [[word:dhayoyoshol|dhayoyoshol]] || [[word:dhayoyokol|dhayoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhayoyothotho|dhayoyothotho]] || [[word:dhayoyojojo|dhayoyojojo]] || [[word:dhayoyoshosho|dhayoyoshosho]] || [[word:dhayoyoko|dhayoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhayoyothon|dhayoyothon]] || [[word:dhayoyojon|dhayoyojon]] || [[word:dhayoyoshon|dhayoyoshon]] || [[word:dhayoyokon|dhayoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhayoyothoro|dhayoyothoro]] || [[word:dhayoyojoro|dhayoyojoro]] || [[word:dhayoyoshoro|dhayoyoshoro]] || [[word:dhayoyokoro|dhayoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
